title: Task Manager App
subtitle: Productivity Platform
summary: A full-stack task management application built for teams that need clean workflows, task status visibility, and maintainable API-driven architecture.
features: Task CRUD with status tracking, due dates, and user-friendly workflow segmentation.
Responsive dashboard layout with reusable Angular UI components and clean routing.
Backend API design with layered structure and SQL Server-backed persistence.

title: Contact Book App
subtitle: Secure Contact Management
summary: A secure contact management system focused on searchable contact records, role-aware access, and clean pagination patterns.
features: JWT login flow with protected routes and API authorization.
Search, filter, and paginated contact listing optimized for usability.
Structured REST APIs connected to SQL Server with scalable entity design.

title: HRMS / Payroll Management System
subtitle: Enterprise Operations Suite
summary: An enterprise-inspired HR and payroll platform concept reflecting real-world work across employee administration, approvals, and payroll processes.
features: Modules for employee records, payroll workflows, and internal reporting views.
Role-based access with secure APIs, validation, and business-rule-driven operations.
Enterprise-ready deployment mindset with Azure-hosted architecture and CI/CD patterns.

title: Employee Leave Management System
subtitle: Workflow Automation
summary: A leave request and approval system designed to simplify employee workflows and make manager approvals easy to track and audit.
features: Employee request submission, leave balances, and approval chains.
Audit-friendly views and filtering for HR and reporting scenarios.
Clean delivery pipeline setup aligned with enterprise release practices.

title: JWT Authentication and RBAC Demo App
subtitle: Security Showcase
summary: A focused demo app illustrating secure authentication flows, role-based authorization, and maintainable API security patterns in ASP.NET Core.
features: Token-based login and refresh-friendly authentication structure.
Role-aware authorization policies for admin, manager, and user scenarios.
Swagger-driven API documentation to accelerate testing and onboarding.
